name: PluginPropertyFileLocationAttribute
summary: Used to specify file location for a property file.

constructors.name: PluginPropertyFileLocationAttribute
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the PluginPropertyFileLocationAttribute class, for a file with provided filename suffix.

params.name: suffix
params.doc: File suffix to register. Must contain the dot, such as ".ExamplePlugin.Data.txt". Should be as specific as possible.

params.name: subdirectory
params.doc: The model folder subdirectory where the attribute should be searched for.

properties.name: Subdirectory
properties.summary: Gets the property file subdirectory in a model folder.
